title: Better Copper Tools
description: This mod adds BETTER copper tools to Minecraft
body:
Have you ever ended up with a load of copper stacked up in your very unorganised chests?
Well with this mod it now has a use, you can use that copper to craft yourself a set of copper tools!!

This mod adds-
Copper hoe, 
Copper axe, 
Copper shovel, 
Copper pickaxe, 
And a new advancment!!,
